steps.text: Masking replaces sensitive values in tool responses with stable aliases. The AI sees the aliases; OpenMaskit swaps them back to real values when the agent sends them in a subsequent call.

You can write a regex pattern here at any time, but Preview needs a real response to test against. Call your tool in 'Try It Out' above first — then you can either click 'Mask' on a value in the tree, or come back and preview a regex.
